专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications are highly recommended in social popularity, matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Physics, Biological Sciences, etc.). Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with strong strength in teacher-training disciplines.
